buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen && pnpm run typecheck:libs && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/portfolio run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server exec esbuild ../../api/_handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=../../api/index.js --external:pg-native --external:fsevents --external:"*.node" --external:pino-pretty --log-level=info
